data.title: Spheria Asset Management Ceases to Be Substantial Holder in Praemium
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Praemium Ltd ( (AU:PPS) ) has shared an update.

Spheria Asset Management Pty Ltd has notified Praemium Ltd that it has ceased to be a substantial holder in the company as of 31 March 2026, in line with disclosure requirements under the Corporations Act 2001. The change reflects a reduction in Spheria’s relevant interest and voting power in Praemium shares, which may slightly alter the company’s institutional shareholder mix and could affect perceptions of its register stability among market participants.

No new associates were disclosed in connection with Spheria’s change of holding, and the firm remains listed at its Brisbane address in the filing. The notice underscores ongoing portfolio adjustments by institutional investors in the Australian wealth-platform sector, a space where shifts in substantial holdings are closely watched as indicators of sentiment toward future growth and strategic direction.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:PPS) stock is a Hold with a A$0.77 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Praemium Ltd stock, see the AU:PPS Stock Forecast page.

More about Praemium Ltd

Praemium Ltd is an Australian-listed company that operates in the financial services and technology sector, providing investment platforms and related administration services to advisers, wealth managers and financial institutions. Its core offering focuses on portfolio administration and reporting solutions that support managed accounts and other investment products for clients in Australia and selected international markets.

Average Trading Volume: 1,132,396

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$314.4M

Breville Group ( (AU:BRG) ) has shared an announcement.

Breville Group Limited has notified the market of the cessation of 8,504 performance rights, recorded under the ASX security code BRGAN. The performance rights lapsed on March 31, 2026, after the conditions attached to those rights were not met or became incapable of being satisfied.

The announcement represents a minor adjustment to Breville’s issued capital structure, with no new securities being issued in connection with these rights. While the update is largely administrative, it may be of interest to shareholders tracking dilution, executive or employee incentive schemes, and overall capital management at the company.

data.title: Montana Aerospace lifts margins and cuts debt as pure-play aerospace business
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Montana Aerospace AG ( (CH:AERO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Montana Aerospace reported a strong 2025 financial year as a focused aerospace player, with net sales from its Aerostructures and Alpine Metal Tech segments rising 15.1% to EUR 979.3 million and adjusted EBITDA up 25.1% to EUR 161.3 million, lifting the margin to 16.5%. The divestments of the E-Mobility and Energy segments, coupled with cost efficiencies and operating leverage, helped sharpen its pure-play profile, improve cash generation, cut net debt to EUR 128.1 million, and underpin guidance for continued growth in sales, profitability and free cash flow through 2027.

Aerostructures remained the core earnings driver, posting 8% sales growth to EUR 881.3 million and a 22.5% jump in adjusted EBITDA as Montana Aerospace benefited from rising OEM demand, capacity expansions in low-cost locations such as Romania and Vietnam, and multi-year contract wins. Alpine Metal Tech more than doubled sales due to a full-year consolidation effect, while disciplined working capital management and liability-to-equity conversions following the Energy divestiture reduced leverage and positioned the group to capitalise on a robust aerospace upcycle despite currency-related hits to the bottom line.

The most recent analyst rating on (CH:AERO) stock is a Buy with a CHF30.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Montana Aerospace AG stock, see the CH:AERO Stock Forecast page.

More about Montana Aerospace AG

Montana Aerospace AG is a Swiss-based supplier of system components and complex assemblies for the aerospace industry, operating 16 engineering and manufacturing sites across four continents. The company employs around 6,300 people and focuses on advanced aluminium, titanium, composite and steel technologies for global OEMs in commercial aerospace and space.

Average Trading Volume: 146,501

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: CHF1.62B

Starts Corporation Inc. ( (JP:8850) ) has shared an announcement.

Starts Corporation Inc. has announced a leadership change within its management team, with the Board of Directors approving the appointment of Takashi Kubota as an executive officer, effective April 2, 2026. Kubota, who currently serves as general manager of the Legal Affairs Office, will assume expanded responsibilities in the executive ranks, signaling a move to strengthen the company’s governance and legal oversight structure.

The appointment underscores Starts Corporation’s focus on reinforcing its internal control and compliance framework at a time when legal risk management is increasingly critical for real estate and service companies. Stakeholders may view this move as an effort to enhance decision-making quality and support sustainable growth by elevating legal expertise to the executive level.

data.title: ASMALLWORLD lifts memberships 38% as new model and partnerships reshape luxury travel platform
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ASMALLWORLD AG ( (CH:ASWN) ) has shared an announcement.

ASMALLWORLD AG, which runs a luxury travel-focused social network and a suite of high-end travel and hospitality services, continued to build out its ecosystem in 2025. Its businesses range from hotel and flight booking platforms to bespoke travel planning, loyalty programme support, and nightlife concierge services, targeting affluent global travellers and strategic B2B partners.

For 2025, the company reported a 38% jump in its member base to 121,922 following the rollout of a new membership model, even as net revenue dipped to CHF 19.1 million amid the transition. Subscription income rose modestly and remained the main revenue driver, while ASMALLWORLD expanded partnerships with airlines and Klarna, invested in a multi‑year data and AI programme, streamlined operations and cut debt, and signalled a 2026 focus on converting scale into profitable, more efficient growth.

Member activity and travel services also advanced, with the ASMALLWORLD Collection growing to nearly 1,800 hotels and bookings increasing by more than 15%, alongside 952 events worldwide that reinforced the brand’s emphasis on in‑person networking. Management expects stable revenue but higher EBITDA and further member growth in 2026, suggesting a shift from heavy investment and restructuring toward monetisation and improved operational leverage for shareholders and partners.

The most recent analyst rating on (CH:ASWN) stock is a Hold with a CHF0.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ASMALLWORLD AG stock, see the CH:ASWN Stock Forecast page.

More about ASMALLWORLD AG

ASMALLWORLD AG operates a luxury travel ecosystem built around its invitation-only social network for discerning travellers and industry partners. The group’s portfolio spans a curated hotel booking platform, bespoke travel agency services, hospitality consulting, loyalty and nightlife concierge offerings, and premium flight and smart luxury travel booking solutions, all aimed at fostering a like-minded global community.

Average Trading Volume: 3,799

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Heiwado Posts Modest Sales Growth but Lower Profit, Lifts Dividend and Targets Earnings Recovery
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

HEIWADO CO ( (JP:8276) ) has issued an announcement.

Heiwado Co., Ltd., a Japanese retailer listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, reported modest top-line growth for the fiscal year ended February 20, 2026, with operating revenue rising 2.5% to ¥456.0 billion. Despite this, operating and ordinary profit were essentially flat, and profit attributable to owners of the parent declined 12.3% to ¥9.4 billion, leading to a drop in basic earnings per share to ¥189.29.

The company strengthened its financial position, with total assets increasing to ¥313.1 billion and the equity ratio improving to 62.5%, while cash and cash equivalents at period-end fell to ¥19.2 billion as operating cash flow decreased and investment outlays rose. Heiwado raised its annual dividend from ¥63.00 to ¥66.00 per share, signaling continued shareholder returns, and issued forecasts for fiscal 2027 that project 4.8% growth in operating revenue and a 4.1% increase in profit attributable to owners of the parent, suggesting expectations of a gradual earnings recovery despite recent profit pressure.

More about HEIWADO CO

Heiwado Co., Ltd. is a Japanese retail company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, operating primarily in the general merchandise and supermarket sector. The group focuses on regional retailing, generating operating revenue from store-based sales and related services, with operations concentrated in its domestic market under Japanese GAAP reporting standards.

Average Trading Volume: 173,139

Current Market Cap: Yen134.8B
